summary: The Department of Science and Technology, under India’s National Quantum Mission, has established a Task Force to develop and implement a Quantum Safe Ecosystem in India. Following extensive consultations with stakeholders, the Task Force produced a comprehensive report titled “Implementation of Quantum Safe Ecosystem in India.” The Department is publicly inviting comments on the report through Dr. Joynarayan Mukherjee, with a submission deadline set for February 19, 2026. This marks a formal effort by the Indian government to address the challenge of quantum-safe cryptography and secure communications, signifying a coordinated national response to the evolving threats posed by quantum computing to current digital infrastructure.
